vocab.example: The watch my parents gave me for graduation serves as a tangible reminder of their unwavering support.

vocab.meaning: kỷ niệm một cột mốc quan trọng
vocab.example: My company presented me with a gold watch to commemorate a milestone of ten years of service.
Receiving a luxury timepiece from my mentor was an incredibly generous gesture that I never expected.

vocab.meaning: gợi lại những kỷ niệm đẹp
vocab.example: Every time I glance at the dial, it evokes fond memories of my childhood and my father.
I was absolutely blown away by the exquisite design and the sapphire crystal of the watch I received.

vocab.meaning: biểu hiện của sự trân trọng/biết ơn
vocab.example: My partner gave me this smartwatch as a token of appreciation for helping her through a difficult project.

vocab.meaning: một thiết kế cổ điển không bao giờ lỗi mốt
vocab.example: The watch I got is a timeless classic that looks just as good with a suit as it does with casual wear.

vocab.meaning: có giá trị vô cùng lớn (thường về mặt tinh thần)
vocab.example: While it might not be expensive, this gift holds immense value to me because of who gave it to me.
I vividly remember the surprise party where I was gifted the watch, and I still cherish the moment to this day.

vocab.meaning: được chế tác một cách tỉ mỉ
vocab.example: The watch features a meticulously crafted leather strap that feels incredibly premium on the wrist.
